text.title: GitLab Boards — Tools, Integrations, and References
text.summary: CLI tools, SaaS integrations, best practices, and references for GitLab Issue Board management.

list.item: glab — native GitLab CLI; create issues, MRs, comment, label, close (https://gitlab.com/gitlab-org/cli)
python-gitlab — Python client for curator and triage agents (pip install python-gitlab)
gitlabform — idempotently apply project/group config (labels, MR settings) from YAML (https://github.com/gitlabform/gitlabform)
yq / jq — read and patch labels, milestones, board configs (apt install yq jq)
mermaid-cli (mmdc) — render dependency graphs from issue links (npm i -g @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli)
gitlab-runner — local runner for .gitlab-ci.yml jobs that update boards on events
pre-commit — lint .gitlab/issue_templates/*.md and labels.yaml (https://pre-commit.com)
GitLab.com SaaS — REST + GraphQL; tier gates Premium features (WIP, iterations, multi-board).
GitLab Self-Managed CE/EE — on-prem default for regulated/airgapped orgs; same APIs.
Mattermost (often paired) — Slack-equivalent for GitLab-first orgs; ChatOps for board updates.
Sentry / GlitchTip — error → GitLab issue auto-creation (REST).
ServiceNow — pair Service Desk → GitLab for ITSM-tracked issues.
GitLab Service Desk (built-in) — external requests as issues with labels; scrub before model calls.
Jira (with bridge) — migration source; pair with GitLab Jira Cloud Integration during transition.

rule.statement: Keep label count at or below 20 active labels; archive deprecated labels rather than reusing or deleting.
rule.rationale: Reusing deprecated labels corrupts history — old issues inherit the new meaning. Archiving preserves the audit trail.

rule.statement: Tie every MR to an issue; every closed issue must reference an MR (except docs-only).
rule.rationale: Traceability from requirement to code change is the primary compliance and debugging artifact in regulated environments.

rule.statement: Use Roadmaps + Epics for portfolio (Premium+); keep epics at 3 levels maximum.
rule.rationale: Deep nesting (4+ levels) makes roadmap rendering unreadable and cross-team planning impossible without a dedicated tool.

list.item: GitLab Issue Boards — https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/user/project/issue_board.html
GitLab Labels (incl. scoped) — https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/user/project/labels.html
GitLab Iterations — https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/user/group/iterations/
GitLab Quick Actions — https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/user/project/quick_actions.html
GitLab API REST — https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/api/
GitLab API GraphQL — https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/api/graphql/
GitLab Service Desk — https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/user/project/service_desk/
python-gitlab — https://python-gitlab.readthedocs.io
gitlabform — https://github.com/gitlabform/gitlabform
Sibling methodologies: kanban-fundamentals/, agile-ceremonies-setup/, pm-tool-selection/, cross-tool-migration/
